Tolga Polat

Head of Digital Marketing at incehesap.com. Building growth systems, automation pipelines, and data-driven strategies from Istanbul.

About

Digital marketing leader with 8+ years in e-commerce, performance marketing, and growth strategy. Managing a 12-person team across SEM, SEO, CRM, influencer, and content channels.

I build systems that scale — forecasting engines, automated reporting pipelines, and marketing infrastructure that ties every decision back to measurable revenue impact.

Google Ads Meta Ads GA4 SEO CRO Looker Studio N8N Data Analytics Growth Strategy Team Leadership E-commerce Automation

incehesap.com

Leading digital marketing strategy across all channels. Nearly doubled ROAS through campaign optimization. Led go-to-market for native mobile app launch. Managing multi-million TRY annual budget.

incehesap.com

Managed content team of 4. Built SEO-driven content strategy that drove significant organic traffic growth and session engagement.

Managed performance marketing, SEO, and email campaigns. Developed omnichannel strategy across 100+ retail stores. Achieved 75% organic traffic increase via content.
